mapper.select: SELECT id, event_code, name, point_amount, credit_amount, daily_cap, enabled, description, sort_order, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM reward_rule WHERE event_code = #{eventCode} AND enabled = 1
SELECT id, level, level_name, min_point, levelup_credit, levelup_coupon_code, benefit_note, active, created_at, updated_at FROM user_level_policy WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY min_point ASC, level ASC
SELECT id AS user_id, activity_point, user_level, credit FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_reward_history (user_id, event_code, idempotency_key, point_delta, credit_delta, level_before, level_after, ref_type, ref_id, reason) VALUES (#{userId}, #{eventCode}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{pointDelta}, #{creditDelta}, #{levelBefore}, #{levelAfter}, #{refType}, #{refId}, #{reason})
